title: Create: Artifact
description: Create: Artifact this mod will add some artifacts related to the Create mod
body:
# Create: Artifact

**In my mod, you will find several artifacts with interesting functionality. For more information, see the description of each artifact in the game itself.**


<details>
<summary>Bubel artifacts</summary>
  
**When in the inventory, refills the Backtank with air**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Nether Bubel artifacts</summary>
  
**When in the inventory, refills the Backtank with air much more efficiently**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Chronoaccelerator</summary>
  
**Speeds up the operation of Millstones and Crushing Wheels within a 5-block radius when in the inventory**

</details>



<details>
<summary>Tree Fertilizer block</summary>

**Accelerates the growth of trees within a 5 block radius**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Сhrono Accelerator block</summary>

_The same as an item, just a block_

</details>




```
If you have any complaints or suggestions for the mod, you can write to me in the discord: huiglot2.
```
